title: Data and code accompanying Chakraborty et al PNAS 2020
author: Meenakshi Chakraborty
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Data and code accompanying Chakraborty et al PNAS 2020 ("MicroRNAs organize intrinsic variation into stem cell states"). Please note, RNA seq and miRNA seq data are available separately at the Gene Expression Omnibus (GEO), Accession number GSE132708.
